prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39区间，属中上游985；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第82、评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低；历史投档异常记录中未见东北大学相关断档信号；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共6个：控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、软件工程A-、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，其中控制、计算机、软件等与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，东北大学作为传统理工强校受益于相关专业热度；福建省2026年物理类考生约20.4万人（按历史占比76%估算），较2025年19.2万人增长约6%，竞争加剧；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，距福建较远，属跨省招生；本省招生计划占比较小（物理类112人），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平但本省物理类考生增长约6%导致竞争加剧、学校层次稳定且声誉中性，在2025年基准8461名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约8581名，区间8081–9081名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6937 → 7238 → 7828 → 8849 → 8461, showing an overall backward trend. It peaked at 8849 in 2024 and slightly recovered to 8461 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1524 places over the past 5 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 8461. From 2021 to 2024, the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 107 students each year, increasing to 112 in 2025, and remaining at 112 in 2026, with no additional expansion or contraction signals.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 38th, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 82nd overall, rated as average, with relatively low short video exposure. No historical abnormal admission signals related to Northeastern University have been found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Control Science and Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Metallurgical Engineering (A), Software Engineering (A-), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), among which Control, Computer, and Software are highly related to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended. As a traditional strong engineering university, Northeastern University benefits from the popularity of related majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province is approximately 204,000 (estimated based on a historical proportion of 76%), an increase of about 6% from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, which is far from Fujian, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The provincial enrollment plan accounts for a small proportion (112 students in Physics Category), so regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 but an increase of about 6% in provincial Physics Category examinees leading to intensified competition, stable university level, and neutral reputation, a slight backward shift in ranking is expected based on the 2025 baseline of 8461. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8581, with a range of 8081–9081.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Talent Class)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Computer Science (including Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (including Metallurgical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8081–9081, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8000), focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 9000), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
